title: Damaged Goods Refund Policy
text: If an item arrives damaged or defective, the buyer is eligible for a full refund or replacement within 7 days of delivery. The buyer must provide photo evidence of the damage. Refunds are processed within 3-5 business days after verification. This policy applies to all product categories except digital goods and perishables.

title: Non-Delivery Refund Policy
text: If an order is confirmed as lost or undelivered by the courier within the expected delivery window, the buyer is eligible for a full refund. The claim must be raised within 15 days of the expected delivery date. The platform will initiate a courier investigation before issuing the refund. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after investigation completion.

title: Electronics Return Policy — Non-Returnable
text: Electronics and gadgets are NON-RETURNABLE once opened and used, unless the item is defective on arrival (Dead on Arrival). The general 30-day return window does NOT apply to electronics, laptops, mobile phones, tablets, audio equipment, or any electronic accessories. Defective electronics may be exchanged or refunded within 7 days of delivery with clear proof of manufacturing defect. Change of mind, incompatibility, or buyer preference are not valid grounds for return of electronics.

title: General Return Policy
text: Most non-electronic items are eligible for return within 30 days of delivery, provided they are unused, undamaged, and in original packaging with all tags intact. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after the returned item is received and passes inspection. Items that show signs of use, damage, or missing accessories are not eligible for return under this policy.

title: Legal Threat and Fraud Escalation Policy
text: Any ticket containing legal threats, allegations of fraud or criminal conduct, or references to law enforcement, courts, or legal proceedings must be immediately escalated to a senior human compliance agent. Automated resolution is strictly prohibited for such cases. A unique case reference number is issued within 15 minutes and the case is reviewed by the compliance team within 24 hours.
